title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: DeepSeek released their V4 flagship model, which achieves significant reductions in inference cost and compute demand compared to prior models. The analysis discusses V4's efficiency gains, architectural innovations, and positioning in the open versus closed lab competition in the AI race.
